title: lestx's Creeper Redesign
description: Vanilla-style creeper redesign featuring smoother and softer colors.
body:
A vanilla-style creeper redesign with smoother shading, softer greens, and cleaner details.

### About

lestx’s Creeper Redesign is a vanilla-friendly resource pack that subtly refreshes the Creeper’s look without changing what makes it iconic. It focuses on smoother shading, softer, more natural green tones, and cleaner details while keeping the original shape and style intact.

### Features

- Smoother shading for a more modern, less “noisy” look
  
- Softer, natural greens that blend better with the vanilla palette
  
- Cleaner facial details while keeping the classic Creeper identity
  
- 16x resolution (matches vanilla)
### Compatibility

- Minecraft: Java Edition
  
- 1.21.x
  
- No gameplay changes. No performance impact. Should work fine with most shaders and modded clients (it only replaces the Creeper texture).

### Notes

If you want more vanilla polish across your game, this pack pairs well with other “vanilla-like” visual tweak packs (but it also works perfectly on its own).

### Feedback / Issues

Found a bug or have a suggestion? Leave a comment and I’ll take a look.
